photoPolicy.reason: Operational standard for asynchronous teledermatology review; the adult-only gate must be completed before photos are requested.
requiredViews: one additional angle or comparison area
photoPolicy.overrideText: I cannot provide 3 photos right now and understand Dr. Eckert may request more before making a diagnosis or prescribing.

globalUrgentFlags: Trouble breathing, swallowing, or swelling of lips/tongue/throat
Fever, feeling very sick, or a rapidly spreading rash/infection
Severe pain, rapidly worsening swelling, or skin turning black/purple
Eye involvement, vision changes, or rash/blisters near the eye
A changing, bleeding, painful, or suspicious mole/spot that may need biopsy
globalCautionFlags: Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding
Diabetes, poor circulation, organ transplant history, or active cancer treatment
History of severe medication allergy or anaphylaxis

concerns.label: Acne
urgentFlags: Severe swelling around the eyes or face
Fever or rapidly worsening painful bumps
cautionFlags: Severe cystic acne with scarring
Interested in isotretinoin

concerns.label: Rosacea & redness
urgentFlags: Eye pain, light sensitivity, or vision changes
Sudden facial swelling with trouble breathing/swallowing
cautionFlags: Frequent flushing triggered by medications or systemic symptoms

concerns.label: Melasma
urgentFlags: A spot that is changing quickly, bleeding, painful, or irregular
cautionFlags: Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding

concerns.label: Dark spots / PIH
urgentFlags: A spot that is changing quickly, bleeding, painful, or irregular
cautionFlags: History of keloids or scarring
Recent burn, chemical peel, or procedure

concerns.label: Fine lines & aging
urgentFlags: A changing, bleeding, painful, or suspicious lesion
cautionFlags: Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding
Recent cosmetic procedure or laser treatment

concerns.label: Hair loss
urgentFlags: Painful scalp swelling, drainage, or fever
Rapid hair loss with severe illness symptoms
cautionFlags: Patchy hair loss
Scalp scaling, pustules, or scarring
Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding

concerns.label: Dandruff / seborrheic dermatitis
urgentFlags: Painful scalp swelling, drainage, or fever
cautionFlags: Severe scalp pain or hair loss
Immunocompromised

concerns.label: Excessive sweating
urgentFlags: Chest pain, fainting, shortness of breath, or new neurologic symptoms
New night sweats with fever or unexplained weight loss
New one-sided sweating
cautionFlags: Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding
History of glaucoma, urinary retention, or heart rhythm problems

concerns.label: Warts
urgentFlags: Rapidly changing, bleeding, or very painful growth
Signs of infection such as fever, spreading redness, or pus
cautionFlags: Genital-area lesions
Diabetes, poor circulation, or immunocompromised

concerns.label: Cold sores & herpes
urgentFlags: Eye pain, eye redness, or sores near the eye
Confusion, severe headache, stiff neck, or neurologic symptoms
Widespread blisters, fever, or severe illness
cautionFlags: Pregnant or immunocompromised
New genital sores or possible STI exposure

concerns.label: Perioral dermatitis
urgentFlags: Eye involvement or vision changes
Severe facial swelling or trouble breathing/swallowing
cautionFlags: Recent topical steroid use on the face
Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding

concerns.label: Folliculitis / ingrown hairs
urgentFlags: Large painful abscess, fever, or rapidly spreading redness
Severe pain or skin turning dark/black
cautionFlags: Recurrent boils
Diabetes, immunocompromised, or history of MRSA

concerns.label: Fungal rash
urgentFlags: Fever, severe pain, rapidly spreading rash, or skin breakdown
Rash near the eye
cautionFlags: Diabetes or immunocompromised
Nail/scalp involvement or widespread rash

concerns.label: Intertrigo / yeast rash
urgentFlags: Fever, severe pain, spreading warmth/redness, or open wounds
Rapidly worsening rash in skin folds
cautionFlags: Diabetes or immunocompromised
Recurrent or widespread flares

concerns.label: Impetigo
urgentFlags: Fever, rapidly spreading redness, severe pain, or facial/eye swelling
cautionFlags: Recurrent infections or household outbreak
Immunocompromised

concerns.label: Scabies
urgentFlags: Crusted/thick widespread scaling, fever, or severe infection signs
cautionFlags: Household, school, nursing facility, or group-living outbreak
Pregnant, breastfeeding, or immunocompromised

concerns.label: Genital warts
urgentFlags: Severe pelvic/testicular pain, fever, or painful genital ulcers
Pregnancy with rapidly changing genital lesions
cautionFlags: New STI exposure or multiple symptoms
Immunocompromised

concerns.label: Nail fungus
urgentFlags: Diabetic foot wound, severe pain, spreading redness, or drainage
cautionFlags: Liver disease or heavy alcohol use
Interested in oral antifungal medication
Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding

concerns.label: Aphthous ulcers / canker sores
urgentFlags: Trouble swallowing, dehydration, or severe mouth swelling
Mouth ulcer lasting more than 2 weeks or unexplained weight loss
Eye/genital ulcers with mouth ulcers
cautionFlags: Frequent recurrent ulcers
Immune suppression, inflammatory bowel disease, or new medication

concerns.label: Hidradenitis suppurativa
urgentFlags: Fever, rapidly spreading redness, severe pain, or abscess needing drainage
cautionFlags: Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding
Recurrent draining tunnels or severe scarring

concerns.label: Keratosis pilaris
urgentFlags: Rapidly spreading painful rash, fever, or pus
cautionFlags: Very inflamed or painful bumps

concerns.label: Eyelash growth
urgentFlags: Eye pain, vision change, eye redness, or eye injury
cautionFlags: History of glaucoma, eye surgery, or eye inflammation
Pregnant, trying to become pregnant, or breastfeeding

concerns.label: Something else
urgentFlags: Severe symptoms, fever, rapidly spreading rash, eye involvement, or suspicious changing lesion
cautionFlags: Not sure whether this can be handled online

eligibility.hardStopText: This service is currently available only to patients 18 and older.
